assertions.assertion: A class extending DefaultProfileService or implementing IProfileService is defined
assertions.rationale: CustomProfileService implements IProfileService (not extending DefaultProfileService, but the assertion allows either).

assertions.assertion: The GetProfileDataAsync method uses context.AddRequestedClaims() rather than directly adding all claims to IssuedClaims
assertions.rationale: The code manually filters claims using context.RequestedClaimTypes and adds them via context.IssuedClaims.AddRange(). It does NOT use context.AddRequestedClaims().

assertions.assertion: The implementation checks for token exchange authentication method and forwards the JwtClaimTypes.Actor claim when present
assertions.rationale: The code checks for an 'act' claim using string literal Subject.HasClaim(c => c.Type == "act"), not checking the authentication method for token exchange. Also uses "act" instead of JwtClaimTypes.Actor.

assertions.assertion: The profile service is registered via AddProfileService<T>() on the IdentityServer builder
